Vermilion Orb of Torrefaction  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +10 MANA: +35
Effect: Inferno Shock (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 40
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Vermilion Orb of Torrefaction
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +10 MANA: +35
Effect: Inferno Shock (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 40
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Orb of Torrefaction
Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Srophkor
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-14 07:43:48
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Velketor the Sorcerer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth

QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2003 at 2:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362297633
37 posts
I could see being happy with these items soloing when you wanted to finish off a mob without wasting mana for the next mob. If I'm gonna take 10 secs to cast something these days it sure as hell gonna do more dmg then the robe or this pos. After 62 I would be embarrased to be using this junk in a group and especially on a raid.

# Jul 04 2001 at 4:01 AM Rating: Decent

The casting time of the orb is something like 8 or 9 seconds, and is interrupted if u move or duck. it looks like a glowing black stone when worn.

# Jul 05 2001 at 12:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757464810
156 posts
9 seconds casting time sounds about right. Who cares though, its a free nuke.

ANY Caster can use all the help they can get with mana management and having right click items is the way to go.

Nice for the wizzies.
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 11:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762479318
15 posts
The effect is a 250Dmg fire based DD. I don't know the casting time on this, but its probably 2x the normal spell rate.
Still 15AC, and 10 int makes this a really nice item. Velk is a really nice caster mob.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 03 2001 at 9:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this thing will save a life and that int wow 15 int 15 ac and 35 mana that has to be one of the best held items too bad its wizard only best nukes aand ports aint enough ive em the best weapons also cant wait til an all wisdom/int one surfaces my shaman and chanter both need some thing LIKE this

# Jul 04 2001 at 3:35 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756653465
Scholar
42 posts
Don't knock on Wizards til you played one past 35th level.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 04 2001 at 6:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Um, wizards die so much, no one wants them in groups because they are not so efficient, which is why they added those anti gate spells. And WTF, Shammies have a JBB, how is that not as good as this item for the DD?
RE: well if its triggered
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 1:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757381256
26 posts
I love JBB, don't get me wrong.. But this has a Spell almost as good as JBB's, and INT+Mana Attached. I'd wet myself if JBB had similar stats. Why? Because, even with my Rune Etched BP on I don't have a 200 Wis. I have to sack Wis in favor of AC all the time. THAT is why Shaman's would love an item similar to this. Not complainin, just thought you should be informed b4 you say something you apparently don't know much about. B4 ya say anything about the Wis being too low for my level. I say this, look at all the races who can be Wizards and their Base INT, then look at Shamans and their Base WIS.
▲ Page top
jbb is a lot easier to get than this
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2001 at 7:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762681291
91 posts
People were angry about shamans getting a DD proc item, and they arent even supposed to have that kinda thing, and your angry about wizards, the supposed masters of damage, getting a comparable item off velketor, who is a lot harder than that guy in the crypt that drops this, forget the name.
▲ Page top
RE: jbb is a lot easier to get than this
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2003 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259853881
35 posts
i dont think the original poster was upset or complaining in anyway, in fact he was complementing them on such a nice item, he said Im not complaining or anything - bam right there your entire post was indeed rendered worthless, he was merely stating the fact that the jbb didnt have stats so this item was really good..... and shamans arent supposed to have that kind of thing, what cavity did you pull that out of?? bet i can guess which one considering altho known for their dots and slows, they do infact get some decent nukes, just not used very often as it is not their main role nor do they have the extra mana to use them, but talk to a soloing shaman and then come back, they dot dot slow while pet attacks, they heal pet and use all other mana towards nuking...jbb is probably the only piece of shaman gear worth anything, the rest, you have to admit, sucks a$$, i mean the effect on the breastplate is bad enough, you thought rangers had it bad, atleast theirs is useful every once in a while if the want to go sell something....
▲ Page top

Even though you can look up this spell on any EQ site, thought I'd put it down.... 250 dmg fire based DD spell, 3.6 sec cast time on the normal spell BUT the casting times on right click items are usually a bit longer, I'd guess around 5 seconds, correct me if I'm wrong.
